use_cases: Displaying status labels on product cards
Showing notification counts on navigation items
Marking feature flags or version numbers
ai_summary: A lightweight badge component from the shadcn/ui design system that displays small status indicators or labels. Supports multiple variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) for different visual treatments. Built with Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority for consistent styling. Commonly used in navigation, cards, and data tables to communicate status or categorization.
